channel.title: Project Sunrise - Project 2025 Tracker
channel.description: Verified administrative actions tracking Project 2025 implementation. Primary sources on every event.

item.title: Public Opinion Data: Pew Research finds only 18% of Americans trust the federal government 'just about always' or 'most of the time' - near historic lows amid i…
item.description: Pew Research finds only 18% of Americans trust the federal government 'just about always' or 'most of the time' - near historic lows amid institutional legitimacy crisis. (Severity 6/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Tracker Assessment: Center for Progressive Reform reports over 53% of Project 2025's domestic administrative policy agenda initiated or completed within the ad…
item.description: Center for Progressive Reform reports over 53% of Project 2025's domestic administrative policy agenda initiated or completed within the administration's first year. (Severity 9/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Legislative Proposal: 32 states introduced 127 bills restricting voting access, including limits on mail ballot drop boxes, shortened early voting, and expanded …
item.description: 32 states introduced 127 bills restricting voting access, including limits on mail ballot drop boxes, shortened early voting, and expanded voter roll purges. (Severity 9/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Documentation Milestone: Independent watchdog cross-references reached a 125-event milestone on coordinated erosion of proactive disclosure - spanning FOIA delays, …
item.description: Independent watchdog cross-references reached a 125-event milestone on coordinated erosion of proactive disclosure - spanning FOIA delays, lobbying log gaps, press access limits, and ethics filing extensions that SAFE-004 targets. (Severity 9/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Press Access: Multiple federal agencies curtailed routine press briefing transcripts and on-camera Q&A - limiting real-time public scrutiny of policy rol…
item.description: Multiple federal agencies curtailed routine press briefing transcripts and on-camera Q&A - limiting real-time public scrutiny of policy rollouts documented in prior CPR tracker entries. (Severity 6/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Spending Transparency: Federal spending portals narrowed machine-readable lobbying and contract metadata fields - reducing public ability to cross-reference vendo…
item.description: Federal spending portals narrowed machine-readable lobbying and contract metadata fields - reducing public ability to cross-reference vendor payments with rulemaking commenters. (Severity 7/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Congressional Action: Congress invoked the Congressional Review Act to overturn 7 federal agency rules in a single year - the highest CRA usage since its 1996 en…
item.description: Congress invoked the Congressional Review Act to overturn 7 federal agency rules in a single year - the highest CRA usage since its 1996 enactment. (Severity 7/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Oversight Report: GAO flagged rising improper-payment rates tied to reduced inspector general staffing - documenting how oversight vacancies weaken fraud rec…
item.description: GAO flagged rising improper-payment rates tied to reduced inspector general staffing - documenting how oversight vacancies weaken fraud recovery ahead of major procurement pushes. (Severity 8/10 · Democracy)

item.title: FOIA Backlog: DOJ Office of Information Policy reported median FOIA response times exceeding statutory limits at multiple agencies - with proactive discl…
item.description: DOJ Office of Information Policy reported median FOIA response times exceeding statutory limits at multiple agencies - with proactive disclosure pages going stale as staffing reviews continued across the executive branch. (Severity 7/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Transparency Halt: A coordinated executive-branch slowdown on proactive open-government publishing reached a 120-event milestone - spanning FOIA backlogs, lob…
item.description: A coordinated executive-branch slowdown on proactive open-government publishing reached a 120-event milestone - spanning FOIA backlogs, lobbying log gaps, and ethics disclosure delays that SAFE-004 is designed to reverse. (Severity 10/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Inspector General Review: Multiple agency IG offices faced staffing reviews and report publication delays - narrowing independent oversight of procurement fraud and …
item.description: Multiple agency IG offices faced staffing reviews and report publication delays - narrowing independent oversight of procurement fraud and ethics violations documented in prior GAO findings. (Severity 8/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Campaign Finance: FEC enforcement docket backlog grew as commission vacancies limited penalties for late disclosure filings - delaying public visibility into…
item.description: FEC enforcement docket backlog grew as commission vacancies limited penalties for late disclosure filings - delaying public visibility into midterm dark-money spending. (Severity 7/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Ethics Rollback: OGE extended financial disclosure filing deadlines for senior appointees - reducing real-time visibility into executive branch conflicts of…
item.description: OGE extended financial disclosure filing deadlines for senior appointees - reducing real-time visibility into executive branch conflicts of interest during agency rulemaking pushes. (Severity 7/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Election Security: CISA scaled back election-security partnership staffing and state coordination grants - weakening federal support for voting-system cyberse…
item.description: CISA scaled back election-security partnership staffing and state coordination grants - weakening federal support for voting-system cybersecurity ahead of the 2026 midterm cycle. (Severity 9/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Records Policy: National Archives issued restrictive guidance on presidential records access requests - narrowing public review windows under the President…
item.description: National Archives issued restrictive guidance on presidential records access requests - narrowing public review windows under the Presidential Records Act amid ongoing FOIA litigation over executive-branch document retention. (Severity 7/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Whistleblower Backlog: Federal whistleblower appeals surged as MSPB vacancies left retaliation cases unresolved - weakening the fraud-recovery and oversight mecha…
item.description: Federal whistleblower appeals surged as MSPB vacancies left retaliation cases unresolved - weakening the fraud-recovery and oversight mechanisms SAFE-004 whistleblower bounties are designed to strengthen. (Severity 8/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Legislative Proposal: Epstein Files Transparency Act introduced in the 119th Congress, requiring DOJ to release unclassified investigation records - amid broader…
item.description: Epstein Files Transparency Act introduced in the 119th Congress, requiring DOJ to release unclassified investigation records - amid broader elite accountability demands. (Severity 5/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Legislative Action: House Judiciary subcommittee advanced markup on the Epstein Files Transparency Act - bipartisan legislation requiring DOJ to release unclas…
item.description: House Judiciary subcommittee advanced markup on the Epstein Files Transparency Act - bipartisan legislation requiring DOJ to release unclassified investigation records on a statutory timeline. (Severity 5/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Disclosure Rollback: Federal agencies scaled back proactive disclosure of lobbying visitor logs and rulemaking comment datasets - reducing machine-readable tran…
item.description: Federal agencies scaled back proactive disclosure of lobbying visitor logs and rulemaking comment datasets - reducing machine-readable transparency required under prior open-government policies. (Severity 7/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Records Withholding: DOJ expanded FOIA exemption claims for executive-branch records tied to political appointees - lengthening backlogs documented on FOIA.gov …
item.description: DOJ expanded FOIA exemption claims for executive-branch records tied to political appointees - lengthening backlogs documented on FOIA.gov and delaying public release of investigation materials. (Severity 7/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Subsidy Expiration: Enhanced ACA premium tax credits expired, raising average benchmark silver plan premiums 18% nationally and affecting 21 million enrollees.
item.description: Enhanced ACA premium tax credits expired, raising average benchmark silver plan premiums 18% nationally and affecting 21 million enrollees. (Severity 8/10 · Healthcare)

item.title: Workforce Reclassification: OPM expanded Schedule F reclassification guidance to additional agency subcomponents - accelerating politically motivated civil-service pur…
item.description: OPM expanded Schedule F reclassification guidance to additional agency subcomponents - accelerating politically motivated civil-service purges across the executive branch ahead of the 2026 midterms. (Severity 10/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Disclosure Rollback: Treasury and IRS moved to weaken nonprofit donor-disclosure requirements for politically active 501(c)(4) organizations - expanding dark-mo…
item.description: Treasury and IRS moved to weaken nonprofit donor-disclosure requirements for politically active 501(c)(4) organizations - expanding dark-money channels documented by OpenSecrets. (Severity 9/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Regulatory Delay: EPA delayed implementation of methane leak detection and repair standards for oil and gas facilities - extending a regulatory freeze that b…
item.description: EPA delayed implementation of methane leak detection and repair standards for oil and gas facilities - extending a regulatory freeze that benefits fossil-fuel operators. (Severity 7/10 · Environment)

item.title: Institutional Vacancy: Merit Systems Protection Board vacancies left thousands of federal whistleblower and Schedule F appeal cases in limbo - removing a key chec…
item.description: Merit Systems Protection Board vacancies left thousands of federal whistleblower and Schedule F appeal cases in limbo - removing a key check on retaliatory firings. (Severity 8/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Enforcement Deadlock: FEC commissioners deadlocked on major campaign-finance enforcement actions and advisory opinions - pausing investigations into undisclosed …
item.description: FEC commissioners deadlocked on major campaign-finance enforcement actions and advisory opinions - pausing investigations into undisclosed independent expenditures ahead of the 2026 cycle. (Severity 8/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Healthcare Policy: CMS approved additional state Medicaid waivers imposing work requirements and premiums - conditioning health coverage on employment in low-…
item.description: CMS approved additional state Medicaid waivers imposing work requirements and premiums - conditioning health coverage on employment in low-wage labor markets. (Severity 8/10 · Healthcare)

item.title: Regulatory Rollback: Education Department finalized Title IX sports regulations excluding transgender student-athletes - reversing inclusive participation rules…
item.description: Education Department finalized Title IX sports regulations excluding transgender student-athletes - reversing inclusive participation rules and inviting litigation in dozens of states. (Severity 7/10 · Education)

item.title: Security Downgrade: CISA election-security grants and state coordination staffing cut ahead of the 2026 midterms - weakening federal support for voting-system …
item.description: CISA election-security grants and state coordination staffing cut ahead of the 2026 midterms - weakening federal support for voting-system cybersecurity and incident response. (Severity 9/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Workforce Reduction: Social Security Administration accelerated field-office closures and staffing cuts - lengthening disability and retirement claim backlogs f…
item.description: Social Security Administration accelerated field-office closures and staffing cuts - lengthening disability and retirement claim backlogs for millions of beneficiaries. (Severity 8/10 · Healthcare)

item.title: Enforcement Pause: CFPB paused major consumer-finance enforcement actions and supervisory exams - gutting mortgage, student-loan, and credit-card protections …
item.description: CFPB paused major consumer-finance enforcement actions and supervisory exams - gutting mortgage, student-loan, and credit-card protections while the agency faces structural dismantling. (Severity 8/10 · Economy)

item.title: Enforcement Halt: Justice Department halted remaining Voting Rights Act Section 2 pattern-or-practice investigations in Georgia, Texas, and Arizona - dismant…
item.description: Justice Department halted remaining Voting Rights Act Section 2 pattern-or-practice investigations in Georgia, Texas, and Arizona - dismantling the federal government's last active voting-rights enforcement tool ahead of the 2026 redistricting cycle. (Severity 10/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Research Termination: NIH terminated additional climate, health-equity, and infectious-disease research grants mid-cycle - disrupting longitudinal studies and un…
item.description: NIH terminated additional climate, health-equity, and infectious-disease research grants mid-cycle - disrupting longitudinal studies and university partnerships nationwide. (Severity 8/10 · Healthcare)

item.title: Enforcement Expansion: DHS expanded National Guard coordination for interior deportation operations - militarizing immigration enforcement in major metro areas wi…
item.description: DHS expanded National Guard coordination for interior deportation operations - militarizing immigration enforcement in major metro areas without new congressional authorization. (Severity 8/10 · Immigration)

item.title: Trade Policy: Reciprocal tariffs escalated against additional trading partners under national-security authority - raising consumer costs and retaliatory…
item.description: Reciprocal tariffs escalated against additional trading partners under national-security authority - raising consumer costs and retaliatory barriers while bypassing congressional trade powers. (Severity 7/10 · Economy)

item.title: Executive Order: Federal speech restrictions expanded to contractors and grant recipients beyond universities - conditioning billions in federal funds on id…
item.description: Federal speech restrictions expanded to contractors and grant recipients beyond universities - conditioning billions in federal funds on ideological compliance with administration speech directives. (Severity 8/10 · Democracy)

item.title: International Withdrawal: WHO withdrawal process advanced with halted pandemic-preparedness funding and paused CDC global health partnerships - isolating U.S. public…
item.description: WHO withdrawal process advanced with halted pandemic-preparedness funding and paused CDC global health partnerships - isolating U.S. public health from international coordination. (Severity 7/10 · Healthcare)

item.title: Funding Pause: IRA clean-energy grant disbursements paused pending political review - stalling home electrification rebates and community solar projects m…
item.description: IRA clean-energy grant disbursements paused pending political review - stalling home electrification rebates and community solar projects mid-implementation. (Severity 8/10 · Environment)

item.title: Workforce Policy: OPM intensified deferred-resignation buyout pressure on career civil servants - offering exit packages while threatening RIFs for employees…
item.description: OPM intensified deferred-resignation buyout pressure on career civil servants - offering exit packages while threatening RIFs for employees who declined, mirroring Project 2025 workforce purge tactics. (Severity 8/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Personnel Action: Second wave of probationary federal employee terminations targeted climate, civil-rights, and inspector-general support staff - acceleratin…
item.description: Second wave of probationary federal employee terminations targeted climate, civil-rights, and inspector-general support staff - accelerating Schedule F implementation through attrition. (Severity 9/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Agency Restructuring: USAID functions absorbed into State Department with foreign-aid portfolio reviews - consolidating humanitarian and development programs und…
item.description: USAID functions absorbed into State Department with foreign-aid portfolio reviews - consolidating humanitarian and development programs under political appointees per Project 2025's State chapter. (Severity 8/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Enforcement Shift: EEOC and OFCCP redirected civil-rights investigators toward DEI program audits while deprioritizing systemic workplace discrimination cases…
item.description: EEOC and OFCCP redirected civil-rights investigators toward DEI program audits while deprioritizing systemic workplace discrimination cases - weaponizing enforcement against inclusion programs. (Severity 8/10 · Civil Rights)

item.title: Personnel Action: Merit Systems Protection Board backlog left thousands of federal employee appeals unresolved - including Schedule F reclassification challe…
item.description: Merit Systems Protection Board backlog left thousands of federal employee appeals unresolved - including Schedule F reclassification challenges - without independent adjudication. (Severity 9/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Agency Action: CMS approved new state Medicaid waivers imposing work requirements and premiums - conditioning health coverage on employment as Project 202…
item.description: CMS approved new state Medicaid waivers imposing work requirements and premiums - conditioning health coverage on employment as Project 2025's HHS chapter recommended. (Severity 8/10 · Healthcare)

item.title: Regulatory Delay: Fish and Wildlife Service delayed Endangered Species Act consultations for energy and infrastructure projects - accelerating fossil and min…
item.description: Fish and Wildlife Service delayed Endangered Species Act consultations for energy and infrastructure projects - accelerating fossil and mining approvals while sidestepping species protections. (Severity 8/10 · Environment)

item.title: Regulatory Action: USDA finalized expanded SNAP work requirements and time limits in additional states - restricting nutrition assistance for able-bodied adul…
item.description: USDA finalized expanded SNAP work requirements and time limits in additional states - restricting nutrition assistance for able-bodied adults without dependents, mirroring Project 2025 Agriculture chapter proposals. (Severity 7/10 · Economy)

item.title: Agency Action: CISA election-security coordination grants and state partnership staffing faced cuts - weakening federal voting-system cybersecurity as mid…
item.description: CISA election-security coordination grants and state partnership staffing faced cuts - weakening federal voting-system cybersecurity as midterm infrastructure funding stalled. (Severity 9/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Policy Rollback: Education Department advanced Title IX sports rules excluding transgender student-athletes - reversing inclusive participation policies ado…
item.description: Education Department advanced Title IX sports rules excluding transgender student-athletes - reversing inclusive participation policies adopted under the prior administration. (Severity 8/10 · Education)

item.title: Executive Order: Interior fast-tracked hardrock mining leases and drilling permits on federal lands - sidestepping tribal consultation and NEPA review timel…
item.description: Interior fast-tracked hardrock mining leases and drilling permits on federal lands - sidestepping tribal consultation and NEPA review timelines. (Severity 9/10 · Environment)

item.title: Policy Restriction: Congress advanced census and voter-registration changes targeting citizenship documentation - fueling noncitizen voting myths Brennan Cente…
item.description: Congress advanced census and voter-registration changes targeting citizenship documentation - fueling noncitizen voting myths Brennan Center research has repeatedly debunked. (Severity 8/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Agency Action: VA accelerated community-care privatization despite GAO-documented overpayment and fraud risks - outsourcing veterans' health services with…
item.description: VA accelerated community-care privatization despite GAO-documented overpayment and fraud risks - outsourcing veterans' health services with weakened oversight. (Severity 8/10 · Healthcare)

item.title: Enforcement Expansion: ICE detention capacity expanded by 40,000 beds through new facility contracts; expedited removal extended to individuals present less than …
item.description: ICE detention capacity expanded by 40,000 beds through new facility contracts; expedited removal extended to individuals present less than two years. (Severity 8/10 · Immigration)

item.title: Regulatory Freeze: OSHA delayed silica exposure and heat-illness rulemakings pending political review - extending the administration-wide freeze on worker-saf…
item.description: OSHA delayed silica exposure and heat-illness rulemakings pending political review - extending the administration-wide freeze on worker-safety protections. (Severity 7/10 · Economy)

item.title: Policy Restriction: Election Assistance Commission security grants delayed as Congress advanced proof-of-citizenship registration mandates - weakening election…
item.description: Election Assistance Commission security grants delayed as Congress advanced proof-of-citizenship registration mandates - weakening election infrastructure funding. (Severity 8/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Executive Order: Interior accelerated offshore oil and gas lease sales in the Gulf of Mexico and Alaska - prioritizing fossil extraction over renewable siti…
item.description: Interior accelerated offshore oil and gas lease sales in the Gulf of Mexico and Alaska - prioritizing fossil extraction over renewable siting on federal waters. (Severity 9/10 · Environment)

item.title: Regulatory Rollback: CMS approved additional state Medicaid waivers imposing work requirements and premiums - conditioning health coverage on employment in high…
item.description: CMS approved additional state Medicaid waivers imposing work requirements and premiums - conditioning health coverage on employment in high-unemployment counties. (Severity 8/10 · Healthcare)

item.title: Policy Rollback: Pentagon reinstated restrictions on gender-affirming care for active-duty service members and paused TRICARE coverage updates - reversing i…
item.description: Pentagon reinstated restrictions on gender-affirming care for active-duty service members and paused TRICARE coverage updates - reversing inclusive military health policies. (Severity 8/10 · Healthcare)

item.title: Policy Restriction: ODNI restricted congressional access to climate-security threat assessments and paused interagency intelligence briefings on election inter…
item.description: ODNI restricted congressional access to climate-security threat assessments and paused interagency intelligence briefings on election interference. (Severity 9/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Regulatory Rollback: USDA expanded SNAP work requirements and shortened time-limit waivers - cutting nutrition assistance for able-bodied adults without depende…
item.description: USDA expanded SNAP work requirements and shortened time-limit waivers - cutting nutrition assistance for able-bodied adults without dependents in high-unemployment areas. (Severity 8/10 · Economy)

item.title: Workforce Reduction: FTC consumer-protection bureau staff placed on leave and new merger challenges halted - curtailing antitrust enforcement aligned with Proje…
item.description: FTC consumer-protection bureau staff placed on leave and new merger challenges halted - curtailing antitrust enforcement aligned with Project 2025's FTC chapter. (Severity 7/10 · Economy)

item.title: Regulatory Rollback: FEC commissioners deadlocked on enforcement matters and paused advisory opinions - stalling campaign-finance investigations as dark-money s…
item.description: FEC commissioners deadlocked on enforcement matters and paused advisory opinions - stalling campaign-finance investigations as dark-money spending surged. (Severity 8/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Enforcement Shift: DOJ Civil Rights Division redirected staff from police pattern-or-practice investigations toward DEI compliance reviews - weakening federal…
item.description: DOJ Civil Rights Division redirected staff from police pattern-or-practice investigations toward DEI compliance reviews - weakening federal oversight of law enforcement misconduct. (Severity 9/10 · Civil Rights)

item.title: Workforce Reduction: Veterans Affairs eliminated DEI offices and placed probationary employees on termination notice - cutting support staff while 700,000 disab…
item.description: Veterans Affairs eliminated DEI offices and placed probationary employees on termination notice - cutting support staff while 700,000 disability claims remain backlogged. (Severity 8/10 · Healthcare)

item.title: Program Termination: USAID headquarters staff placed on leave and foreign assistance programs halted - dismantling decades of global health, famine relief, and …
item.description: USAID headquarters staff placed on leave and foreign assistance programs halted - dismantling decades of global health, famine relief, and democracy-promotion infrastructure. (Severity 9/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Program Freeze: NIH placed new grant applications on hold pending ideological review of research topics - delaying biomedical studies on climate health, re…
item.description: NIH placed new grant applications on hold pending ideological review of research topics - delaying biomedical studies on climate health, reproductive care, and LGBTQ populations. (Severity 9/10 · Healthcare)

item.title: Enforcement Shift: HUD paused fair-housing discrimination investigations and redirected staff toward reviewing DEI-related grant language - weakening enforcem…
item.description: HUD paused fair-housing discrimination investigations and redirected staff toward reviewing DEI-related grant language - weakening enforcement of the Fair Housing Act. (Severity 7/10 · Civil Rights)

item.title: Regulatory Rollback: EPA dismissed members of its Science Advisory Board and Clean Air Scientific Advisory Committee - removing independent scientists who revie…
item.description: EPA dismissed members of its Science Advisory Board and Clean Air Scientific Advisory Committee - removing independent scientists who review pollution standards. (Severity 8/10 · Environment)

item.title: Workforce Reduction: Federal Student Aid office probations terminated and hiring frozen - delaying loan servicing, income-driven repayment processing, and borro…
item.description: Federal Student Aid office probations terminated and hiring frozen - delaying loan servicing, income-driven repayment processing, and borrower assistance for 43 million Americans. (Severity 7/10 · Education)

item.title: Regulatory Change: Department of Education Title IX rules narrowed harassment definitions and mandated live cross-examination hearings, affecting 19 million c…
item.description: Department of Education Title IX rules narrowed harassment definitions and mandated live cross-examination hearings, affecting 19 million college students. (Severity 5/10 · Education)

item.title: Executive Order: Reciprocal tariffs imposed on imports from trading partners to address trade deficits - escalating global trade war and raising consumer pr…
item.description: Reciprocal tariffs imposed on imports from trading partners to address trade deficits - escalating global trade war and raising consumer prices across sectors. (Severity 9/10 · Economy)

item.title: Program Freeze: CDC discretionary grant disbursements halted and staff placed on leave - disrupting disease surveillance, reproductive health data, and sta…
item.description: CDC discretionary grant disbursements halted and staff placed on leave - disrupting disease surveillance, reproductive health data, and state public health partnerships. (Severity 9/10 · Healthcare)

item.title: Program Freeze: NOAA climate research and monitoring programs paused pending ideological spending review - stalling hurricane forecasting and temperature d…
item.description: NOAA climate research and monitoring programs paused pending ideological spending review - stalling hurricane forecasting and temperature data collection. (Severity 8/10 · Environment)

item.title: Workforce Reduction: FEMA disaster preparedness staffing cut ahead of hurricane season - weakening federal response capacity as climate disasters intensify nati…
item.description: FEMA disaster preparedness staffing cut ahead of hurricane season - weakening federal response capacity as climate disasters intensify nationwide. (Severity 8/10 · Environment)

item.title: Workforce Reduction: Social Security Administration placed staff on administrative leave and halted hiring - threatening benefit processing timelines for 70 mil…
item.description: Social Security Administration placed staff on administrative leave and halted hiring - threatening benefit processing timelines for 70 million Americans as DOGE reviews federal payment systems. (Severity 9/10 · Economy)

item.title: Executive Order: Education Secretary directed to take all lawful steps to wind down the Department of Education and return authority to states - a signature…
item.description: Education Secretary directed to take all lawful steps to wind down the Department of Education and return authority to states - a signature Project 2025 objective. (Severity 9/10 · Education)

item.title: Regulatory Rollback: Interior delayed endangered-species listings and weakened migratory bird protections to expedite drilling and mining on federal lands.
item.description: Interior delayed endangered-species listings and weakened migratory bird protections to expedite drilling and mining on federal lands. (Severity 8/10 · Environment)

item.title: Agency Restructuring: USAID functions consolidated under State Department control, eliminating independent foreign aid oversight and humanitarian program autonom…
item.description: USAID functions consolidated under State Department control, eliminating independent foreign aid oversight and humanitarian program autonomy. (Severity 9/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Media Policy: FCC leadership signaled renewed broadcast licensing scrutiny and rolled back diversity policies - aligning with Project 2025's media and co…
item.description: FCC leadership signaled renewed broadcast licensing scrutiny and rolled back diversity policies - aligning with Project 2025's media and communications chapter. (Severity 7/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Enforcement Pause: FTC deprioritized merger challenges and consumer fraud cases under new leadership - weakening antitrust and consumer protection oversight.
item.description: FTC deprioritized merger challenges and consumer fraud cases under new leadership - weakening antitrust and consumer protection oversight. (Severity 8/10 · Economy)

item.title: Regulatory Rollback: HUD paused affirmatively furthering fair housing implementation and redirected resources away from housing discrimination enforcement.
item.description: HUD paused affirmatively furthering fair housing implementation and redirected resources away from housing discrimination enforcement. (Severity 7/10 · Civil Rights)

item.title: Regulatory Rollback: Labor Department halted Biden-era overtime pay expansion for salaried workers - reversing wage protections for an estimated 4 million emplo…
item.description: Labor Department halted Biden-era overtime pay expansion for salaried workers - reversing wage protections for an estimated 4 million employees. (Severity 7/10 · Economy)

item.title: Enforcement Expansion: DHS expanded interior enforcement and expedited removal operations, deploying additional ICE agents and military coordination for mass depo…
item.description: DHS expanded interior enforcement and expedited removal operations, deploying additional ICE agents and military coordination for mass deportation infrastructure. (Severity 9/10 · Immigration)

item.title: Enforcement Shift: EEOC redirected civil rights enforcement toward DEI program investigations while deprioritizing systemic workplace discrimination cases.
item.description: EEOC redirected civil rights enforcement toward DEI program investigations while deprioritizing systemic workplace discrimination cases. (Severity 7/10 · Civil Rights)

item.title: Workforce Reduction: CISA placed staff on administrative leave and halted hiring - weakening election-security and critical-infrastructure cyber defense amid fe…
item.description: CISA placed staff on administrative leave and halted hiring - weakening election-security and critical-infrastructure cyber defense amid federal workforce cuts. (Severity 9/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Regulatory Rollback: EPA initiated review and stay of methane leak detection standards for 280,000 oil and gas well sites, rolling back Biden-era climate rules.
item.description: EPA initiated review and stay of methane leak detection standards for 280,000 oil and gas well sites, rolling back Biden-era climate rules. (Severity 8/10 · Environment)

item.title: Ethics Rollback: Office of Government Ethics enforcement weakened for political appointees, with expanded ethics waivers reducing executive branch financial…
item.description: Office of Government Ethics enforcement weakened for political appointees, with expanded ethics waivers reducing executive branch financial transparency. (Severity 6/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Regulatory Rollback: EPA reopened review of light-duty vehicle greenhouse gas standards - stalling clean-car rules and aligning with Project 2025's deregulatory…
item.description: EPA reopened review of light-duty vehicle greenhouse gas standards - stalling clean-car rules and aligning with Project 2025's deregulatory energy agenda. (Severity 8/10 · Environment)

item.title: Workforce Reduction: Mass termination of probationary federal employees across HHS, VA, and EPA - thousands removed with minimal notice, gutting regulatory and …
item.description: Mass termination of probationary federal employees across HHS, VA, and EPA - thousands removed with minimal notice, gutting regulatory and service capacity. (Severity 8/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Program Termination: IRS Direct File free tax-filing pilot terminated, eliminating a public alternative to commercial tax preparation and reducing access for lo…
item.description: IRS Direct File free tax-filing pilot terminated, eliminating a public alternative to commercial tax preparation and reducing access for low-income filers. (Severity 6/10 · Economy)

item.title: Regulatory Rollback: SEC halted climate risk disclosure requirements for public companies, removing investor transparency on corporate emissions and climate exp…
item.description: SEC halted climate risk disclosure requirements for public companies, removing investor transparency on corporate emissions and climate exposure. (Severity 7/10 · Environment)

item.title: Enforcement Shift: DOJ Civil Rights Division deprioritized voting rights and police accountability cases, redirecting enforcement toward DEI program investiga…
item.description: DOJ Civil Rights Division deprioritized voting rights and police accountability cases, redirecting enforcement toward DEI program investigations. (Severity 9/10 · Civil Rights)

item.title: Enforcement Pause: CFPB halted new enforcement actions and rulemakings under acting leadership - effectively pausing consumer financial protection oversight.
item.description: CFPB halted new enforcement actions and rulemakings under acting leadership - effectively pausing consumer financial protection oversight. (Severity 8/10 · Economy)

item.title: Funding Cut: NIH capped indirect research cost reimbursement at 15%, cutting billions from university and hospital research infrastructure nationwide.
item.description: NIH capped indirect research cost reimbursement at 15%, cutting billions from university and hospital research infrastructure nationwide. (Severity 8/10 · Healthcare)

item.title: Regulatory Rollback: NLRB leadership rescinded pro-worker organizing guidance, reversing Biden-era protections for union elections and collective bargaining rig…
item.description: NLRB leadership rescinded pro-worker organizing guidance, reversing Biden-era protections for union elections and collective bargaining rights. (Severity 7/10 · Economy)

item.title: Enforcement Shift: Labor Department suspended federal contractor affirmative action compliance reviews and redirected OFCCP enforcement toward DEI program inv…
item.description: Labor Department suspended federal contractor affirmative action compliance reviews and redirected OFCCP enforcement toward DEI program investigations. (Severity 7/10 · Civil Rights)

item.title: Agency Action: USAID workforce placed on leave and foreign aid disbursements halted - effectively dismantling the agency without congressional authorizati…
item.description: USAID workforce placed on leave and foreign aid disbursements halted - effectively dismantling the agency without congressional authorization. (Severity 10/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Institutional Weakening: Merit Systems Protection Board lacks quorum to hear federal employee appeals, leaving Schedule F reclassification and mass termination chal…
item.description: Merit Systems Protection Board lacks quorum to hear federal employee appeals, leaving Schedule F reclassification and mass termination challenges without independent adjudication. (Severity 8/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Institutional Access: Treasury granted DOGE-aligned reviewers access to federal payment systems - bypassing standard inspector general oversight for spending dec…
item.description: Treasury granted DOGE-aligned reviewers access to federal payment systems - bypassing standard inspector general oversight for spending decisions. (Severity 9/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Regulatory Guidance: OPM issues Schedule F implementing guidance directing agencies to identify policy-influencing positions for at-will reclassification - pote…
item.description: OPM issues Schedule F implementing guidance directing agencies to identify policy-influencing positions for at-will reclassification - potentially affecting 50,000+ roles. (Severity 9/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Workforce Action: Deferred resignation program offered federal buyouts with agencies instructed to treat non-acceptance as willingness to be terminated - pre…
item.description: Deferred resignation program offered federal buyouts with agencies instructed to treat non-acceptance as willingness to be terminated - pressuring mass voluntary departures. (Severity 8/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Oversight Report: GAO finds Medicaid work-requirement demonstrations impose substantial administrative costs, with federal funds covering the majority of com…
item.description: GAO finds Medicaid work-requirement demonstrations impose substantial administrative costs, with federal funds covering the majority of compliance verification spending. (Severity 6/10 · Healthcare)

item.title: Program Termination: Pentagon eliminated DEI offices and training across the armed services - disbanding advisory groups and canceling diversity initiatives.
item.description: Pentagon eliminated DEI offices and training across the armed services - disbanding advisory groups and canceling diversity initiatives. (Severity 7/10 · Civil Rights)

item.title: Executive Order: Day One rescission of 78 Biden executive orders on climate, equity, and regulation - erasing prior administration policy in a single stroke…
item.description: Day One rescission of 78 Biden executive orders on climate, equity, and regulation - erasing prior administration policy in a single stroke, a core Project 2025 implementation tactic. (Severity 8/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Executive Order: Schedule F reinstated - civil servants in 'policy-influencing' roles reclassified as at-will employees, enabling politically motivated firi…
item.description: Schedule F reinstated - civil servants in 'policy-influencing' roles reclassified as at-will employees, enabling politically motivated firings without merit protections. (Severity 10/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Executive Order: Federal hiring freeze imposed on civilian agencies, beginning workforce contraction aligned with Project 2025's plan to shrink the administ…
item.description: Federal hiring freeze imposed on civilian agencies, beginning workforce contraction aligned with Project 2025's plan to shrink the administrative state by attrition. (Severity 7/10 · Economy)

item.title: Executive Order: Birthright citizenship order directs agencies to deny citizenship documents to U.S.-born children of undocumented parents - a direct challe…
item.description: Birthright citizenship order directs agencies to deny citizenship documents to U.S.-born children of undocumented parents - a direct challenge to the 14th Amendment now blocked in federal court. (Severity 10/10 · Immigration)

item.title: Executive Order: National energy emergency declared to expedite fossil fuel permitting and restrict renewable approvals - implementing Project 2025's deregu…
item.description: National energy emergency declared to expedite fossil fuel permitting and restrict renewable approvals - implementing Project 2025's deregulatory energy agenda. (Severity 9/10 · Environment)

item.title: Executive Order: Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) established with access to federal payment systems and agency data - an unprecedented extra-cons…
item.description: Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) established with access to federal payment systems and agency data - an unprecedented extra-constitutional advisory body driving cuts. (Severity 9/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Executive Order: All federal DEI offices terminated and employees placed on leave; equity-related contracting and training requirements rescinded across eve…
item.description: All federal DEI offices terminated and employees placed on leave; equity-related contracting and training requirements rescinded across every agency. (Severity 7/10 · Civil Rights)

item.title: Executive Order: ICE directed to expand detention, resume border wall construction, and end catch-and-release - implementing Project 2025's mass deportation…
item.description: ICE directed to expand detention, resume border wall construction, and end catch-and-release - implementing Project 2025's mass deportation infrastructure goals. (Severity 9/10 · Immigration)

item.title: Executive Order: U.S. withdrawal from the Paris Climate Agreement initiated for a second time, halting international climate finance and undermining global …
item.description: U.S. withdrawal from the Paris Climate Agreement initiated for a second time, halting international climate finance and undermining global emissions targets. (Severity 9/10 · Environment)

item.title: Executive Order: U.S. withdrawal from the World Health Organization initiated, ending funding and participation in global pandemic preparedness and health c…
item.description: U.S. withdrawal from the World Health Organization initiated, ending funding and participation in global pandemic preparedness and health coordination. (Severity 8/10 · Healthcare)

item.title: Executive Order: Regulatory freeze halts publication of new federal rules and withdraws unpublished regulations pending political review - stalling agency r…
item.description: Regulatory freeze halts publication of new federal rules and withdraws unpublished regulations pending political review - stalling agency rulemaking across government. (Severity 8/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Executive Order: Federal lands drilling order expands oil and gas leasing on public lands and waters, reversing Biden-era restrictions - implementing Projec…
item.description: Federal lands drilling order expands oil and gas leasing on public lands and waters, reversing Biden-era restrictions - implementing Project 2025 energy extraction priorities. (Severity 9/10 · Environment)

item.title: Executive Order: Federal policy redefined to recognize only two biological sexes, directing agencies to remove gender-identity protections from programs - a…
item.description: Federal policy redefined to recognize only two biological sexes, directing agencies to remove gender-identity protections from programs - a Project 2025 civil-service and culture-war priority. (Severity 8/10 · Civil Rights)

item.title: Executive Order: Federal employees ordered back to in-person work, terminating remote arrangements - accelerating attrition alongside hiring freezes and def…
item.description: Federal employees ordered back to in-person work, terminating remote arrangements - accelerating attrition alongside hiring freezes and deferred-resignation pressure. (Severity 6/10 · Economy)

item.title: Executive Clemency: Broad pardons granted to individuals convicted of offenses related to the January 6 Capitol attack - undermining accountability for electio…
item.description: Broad pardons granted to individuals convicted of offenses related to the January 6 Capitol attack - undermining accountability for election subversion. (Severity 10/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Executive Order: Foreign aid disbursements paused pending ideological review - halting humanitarian and development programs worldwide without congressional…
item.description: Foreign aid disbursements paused pending ideological review - halting humanitarian and development programs worldwide without congressional authorization. (Severity 9/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Executive Order: America First Trade Policy directs agencies to review all trade agreements and recommend reciprocal tariffs - initiating Project 2025's pro…
item.description: America First Trade Policy directs agencies to review all trade agreements and recommend reciprocal tariffs - initiating Project 2025's protectionist trade agenda. (Severity 8/10 · Economy)

item.title: Executive Order: Federal censorship coordination with social media platforms prohibited; prior government content-moderation efforts ordered reviewed - resh…
item.description: Federal censorship coordination with social media platforms prohibited; prior government content-moderation efforts ordered reviewed - reshaping platform accountability policy. (Severity 7/10 · Democracy)

item.title: Executive Order: U.S. Refugee Admissions Program suspended pending realignment with administration immigration priorities - halting humanitarian resettlemen…
item.description: U.S. Refugee Admissions Program suspended pending realignment with administration immigration priorities - halting humanitarian resettlement for vulnerable populations. (Severity 9/10 · Immigration)

item.title: Executive Order: Drug cartels directed for designation as foreign terrorist organizations - expanding military and surveillance authorities for domestic imm…
item.description: Drug cartels directed for designation as foreign terrorist organizations - expanding military and surveillance authorities for domestic immigration enforcement operations. (Severity 9/10 · Immigration)

item.title: Executive Order: Federal death penalty restored and Biden-era execution moratorium ended - DOJ directed to resume capital prosecutions and pursue death sent…
item.description: Federal death penalty restored and Biden-era execution moratorium ended - DOJ directed to resume capital prosecutions and pursue death sentences. (Severity 8/10 · Civil Rights)

item.title: Executive Order: Inflation Reduction Act clean energy grant disbursements paused pending ideological review - stalling climate investment programs authorize…
item.description: Inflation Reduction Act clean energy grant disbursements paused pending ideological review - stalling climate investment programs authorized by Congress. (Severity 9/10 · Environment)

item.title: Legislative Proposal: SAVE Act reintroduced in the 119th Congress, requiring documentary proof of citizenship for federal voter registration - a Project 2025 ele…
item.description: SAVE Act reintroduced in the 119th Congress, requiring documentary proof of citizenship for federal voter registration - a Project 2025 elections priority. (Severity 8/10 · Democracy)
